01The Outcome

Understand. Build.
Deploy.

Three shifts take you from “I know I should be using AI but have no idea where to start” to an agent that takes real work off your plate.

01 · Understand

The overwhelm ends

Most CEOs feel they should use agentic AI but have no trustworthy path — so they freeze. First we fix that: the mental model, the vocabulary, the security ground rules. You leave with a clear roadmap and your own server ready to go.

02 · Build

The part you can't do — until you do

Step by step, in guided sessions, you stand up your own agent on your own server. No code. A live agent that answers to you — right from your phone.

03 · Deploy

From demo to co-worker

An agent that isn't working for you is just a demo. We point yours at the real, recurring tasks eating your week. At least one real job off your plate — and you know how to hand it more.

02The 4 Weeks

Four weeks.
One journey.

Four Monday sessions at 09:00 Berlin time, with focused work blocks you complete flexibly during each week.

Hover or tap each waypoint — date, live-session length & weekly work.

#Date & sessionWhat happensYou leave with
01 Kick-off
20 July · 09:00 Berlin · 90 min live		 We map the journey, cover the core concepts and security ground rules, and prepare your first setup steps.Weekly work: approximately 2 hours of guided homework. A clear roadmap and the foundations for your build.
02 The Build
27 July · 09:00 Berlin · 60 min live		 A focused build briefing, followed by the main implementation block: server setup, Hermes installation and Telegram connection.Weekly work: approximately 4 hours. Your own Hermes Agent running on your private server.
03 The Clinic
3 August · 09:00 Berlin · 90 min live		 We solve problems, answer questions and get every agent working through Telegram. Then you harden the server connection.Weekly work: approximately 2–3 hours. A working Hermes Agent you can message through Telegram — with a hardened server connection.
04 The Work
10 August · 09:00 Berlin · 90 min live		 We turn a working agent into a useful daily companion: workflows, recurring tasks and the way Hermes fits your real life.Final setup: approximately 2 hours to tailor everything to you. An agent configured for your daily work — not just a technical demo.
03What's Included

Everything
you get.

  • 4 live sessions with me — Kick-off, Build, Clinic, and The Work.
  • A step-by-step build guide for the solo weeks — no code, nothing to figure out alone.
  • Your own agent, live on your own private server — the asset itself, yours to keep.
  • The live Clinic week, so you're guaranteed to get unstuck.
  • Playbooks for pointing your agent at real, recurring work.
  • Direct access to me throughout the cohort.
  • A small peer group of 10–12 CEOs building alongside you.

price.

05The Guarantee

A working agent.
Guaranteed.

My guarantee
You'll have a working agent by the end of the 4 weeks — or I keep working with you 1-on-1, for free, until you do.

One fair condition: when you hit a snag, ask your own AI first — drop the step-by-step guide into a Claude or ChatGPT project and ask it what to do. That's a skill you're building here anyway. If that doesn't get you unstuck, I step in personally — and we don't stop until your agent runs.
